yaml.title: CV — Germán A. Tessmer
yaml.description: Curriculum Vitae of Germán A. Tessmer. Economist, Director of Observatorio Económico Social UNR, Econometrics Lecturer. Education, publications, consulting, and technical skills.

markdown.markdown:
**Director**, Observatorio Económico Social · Universidad Nacional de Rosario (UNR) *(2019–present)*

**Lecturer**, Econometrics II · Faculty of Economics and Statistics, UNR *(2024–present)*

**Applied Economics Consultant**, private sector *(2022–present)*

---

## Education

- **PhD Candidate in Economics** · Universidad Nacional de Rosario *(thesis proposal submitted, 2026)*
- **MA in Economics** · Universidad de San Andrés *(2012–2013)*
- **Management Development Program** · Universidad Torcuato Di Tella *(2016)*
- **University Teaching Certificate** · Universidad Abierta Interamericana *(2014–2015)*
- **BA in Economics** *(thesis grade: 10/10)* · Universidad Nacional de Rosario *(2000–2006)*

---

## Experience

### Institutional Management & Research

- **Director**, Observatorio Económico Social UNR *(2019–present)*. Leadership of a research and communication unit under the Vice-Rectorate. Production of open data, economic reports, and public-facing analysis for policymakers, journalists, and the general public.
- **Deputy Director**, Observatorio Económico Social UNR *(2014–2019)*.
 

### Teaching

- **Lecturer**, Econometrics II · UNR *(2024–present)*
- **Teaching Assistant**, Sociology · UNR *(2021–present)*
- **Instructor**, Foundations of Data Analytics · UNR School of Trades *(2023–2024)*
- **Teaching Assistant**, Introduction to Social Sciences & Microeconomics II · UNR *(2014–2020)*
- **Guest Lecturer**, Graduate seminars · Universidad Austral Rosario *(2019–2021)*
- **Teaching Assistant**, Economics I · Universidad de San Andrés *(2013)*

### Consulting

- Sectoral analysis of the rubber and latex market (private client, 2022–present)
- Productive Structure of Chaco Province — Livestock Sector · Ministry of Economy of Chaco (2023)
- Hazardous Waste Observatory (2021–present)

---

## Research & Selected Publications

### Working Papers

- **From Breaks to Bridges: An Architecture for Survey Redesigns That Expand Conceptual Scope** *(with Bárbara Boggiano)* [→ SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=6597399){target="_blank"}

### Data

- Tessmer, G.; Moleres, S.; Hess, L. E. (2024). *EPH – Observatorio. Encuesta Permanente de Hogares de Argentina. Explicada, etiquetada y ampliada*. Universidad Nacional de Rosario. [doi:10.57715/UNR/BL85Z8](https://doi.org/10.57715/UNR/BL85Z8){target="_blank"}

### Book

- Navarro, A. I.; Tessmer, G.; D'Elia, V.; et al. (2018). *Cruzar la meta y seguir corriendo. La Universidad Nacional de Rosario y la empleabilidad de sus graduados en el Gran Rosario*. Xanto Editora. ISBN: 978-987-42-9366-4. [→ Repository](http://hdl.handle.net/2133/14532){target="_blank"}

### Reports & Outreach

Director and co-author of over 60 research and outreach reports published between 2015 and 2024 through the Observatorio Económico Social UNR (ISSN 2683-9067). All reports available through the [UNR institutional repository](http://hdl.handle.net/2133/){target="_blank"}.

Selected reports:

- **Nueva ley de alquileres: contexto general y situación de los estudiantes de UNR** *(with Diego Marfetán Molina, Luciano Jara Musuruana, et al.)* · 2021. [→ Repository](http://hdl.handle.net/2133/22647){target="_blank"}
- **Pre-Covid: Indicadores socio-económicos para AGR y Argentina** *(with Luciano Jara Musuruana, Diego Marfetán Molina, et al.)* · 2020. [→ Repository](http://hdl.handle.net/2133/18367){target="_blank"}
- **La educación en Santa Fe y Rosario: resultados Aprender 2016** *(with Patricio Almeida Gentile)* · 2017. [→ Repository](http://hdl.handle.net/2133/17542){target="_blank"}
- **10 preguntas para entender las variaciones del tipo de cambio** · 2016. [→ Repository](http://hdl.handle.net/2133/14520){target="_blank"}

---

## Academic Evaluation

- Thesis jury and external examiner for MA theses at Universidad de San Andrés and Universidad Austral.
- External peer reviewer: *Papers. Revista de Sociología*, Universitat Autònoma de Barcelona (2025).
- Thesis jury for undergraduate dissertations, UNR (2021–present).

---

## Languages

| Language | Level | Certification |
|----------|-------|---------------|
| English | C2 | CAE · Cambridge (2025); C2 EFSET · EF Education First (2025) |
| Spanish | Native | — |

---

## Technical Skills

**Data analysis:** R · Python · SQL · Power BI

**Empirical methods:** LASSO / post-LASSO · causal inference · Heckman selection models · reproducible pipelines

**Tools:** Git · R Markdown / Quarto · AI-assisted empirical workflows

**Certifications:** CAE Cambridge (2025) · Data Analyst with R (DataCamp, 2024) · R Programming Track (DataCamp, 2017) · Intermediate SQL · PostgreSQL Window Functions · Introduction to Python (DataCamp, 2022–2024) 

---

*Full CV available upon request.*
